beer.beer_description: Delta Dawn is a brand-new DIPA straight out of our R&D program. Taking inspiration from the hop-saturated ales we tried in the US, we’ve mashed this monster with extra-pale malt and over 50% oat adjuncts, providing a thick and luscious base for the 35 g/L dry hop to rest upon. Soulfully hopped with freshly landed, hand-selected Freestyle & Eggers hops from this year’s NZ harvest— Peacharine, Nelson Sauvin, Nectaron, and world-favourite LiLy™—this is fresh hoppy ale at its finest, folks ✌️
beer.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

items.badge_description: Congrats, you've unlocked the World Pint 2026: Australia badge! Keep checking in beers to score badges from the other 47 countries competing in the world's biggest football competition. Keep up to date on future badges by following us on social @untappd!

Thanks for staying at home, and checking in with Untappd! It allows us to stay connected to a community of beer lovers, just like you, even if we can't be in the same physical location. From our home to yours, cheers and stay safe!

Looking for more kick than a session beer, but want to be able to stay for a few rounds? You have to keep it in the middle. That's 200 beers with an ABV greater than 5% and less than 10%. Try 5 more for Level 41!

When a single isn’t enough, make it a double. Doubling the hops and malts in a recipe results in a higher ABV and can pack quite a boozey punch. That's 20 different beers with the style that contains Imperial / Double in its style name. Try 5 more for Level 5!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 370 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 75!

beer.beer_description: Delta Dawn is a brand-new DIPA straight out of our R&D program. Taking inspiration from the hop-saturated ales we tried in the US, we’ve mashed this monster with extra-pale malt and over 50% oat adjuncts, providing a thick and luscious base for the 35 g/L dry hop to rest upon. Soulfully hopped with freshly landed, hand-selected Freestyle & Eggers hops from this year’s NZ harvest— Peacharine, Nelson Sauvin, Nectaron, and world-favourite LiLy™—this is fresh hoppy ale at its finest, folks ✌️
beer.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

user.bio: Trying to rate beers for what they are, while knowing my taste is heavily subjective.

items.badge_description: You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 405 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 82!

items.comment: Damn was hoping to go there today too

items.badge_description: The one thing we like more than whipping up epic brews, is sharing them with you legends! Sip on 5 more One Drop beers to level up this badge. Cheers!

While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 60 check-ins at venue that is verified. Try 5 more for Level 13!

Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 110 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 23!
We believe in IPA and you should too. You certainly have a taste for the hops! That's 85 different IPAs. Try 5 more for Level 18! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 75 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 16!

items.checkin_comment: The apex predator of tonight’s beers so far. Big fruit. Big hop
